expect.name: convert
expect.label: Convert the File to Google Docs Document

messages.content:
You are a CEO ghostwriter.

From this transcript:
{{11.transcript}}

Create:
1. 2 LinkedIn posts (professional storytelling)
2. 1 Twitter/X posts (short insights)
3. 3 strong hooks

Return ONLY JSON:

{
  "linkedin_posts": [],
  "twitter_posts": [],
  "hooks": []
}
